gauge.name: East Fork Trinity River at McKinney

impacts.statement: Major out of bank flooding is expected. Flood waters will overflow the road. Major flooding will occur to agricultural land and rural roads in area.
Major flooding is expected near the gauge with farm and ranch land flooded along the river.
Moderate out of bank flooding will occurr near the river. Farm and ranch land will flood.
Moderate out of bank flooding will occur along the river. Farm and ranch land will flood, along with a few rural roads.
Minor out of bank flooding will begin along the river.

dataAttribution.text: USGS--Water Resources of the United States
dataAttribution.title: US Geological Survey
Observations courtesy of U.S. Geological Survey

hydronotes.statement: River forecasts for this location take into account past precipitation and the precipitation amounts expected approximately 24 hours into the future from the forecast issuance time.

gauge.forecastReliability: Forecasts are issued as needed during times of high water, but are not routinely available.
